OhmBit is an AI-powered browser agent that helps you automate web tasks directly in your browser. Through a clean sidepanel chat…

OhmBit is an AI-powered browser agent that helps you automate web tasks directly in your browser. Through a clean sidepanel chat interface, you can instruct the agent to navigate websites, fill out forms, extract data, click elements, and perform complex multi-step workflows — all using natural language. It works with any website and supports multiple LLM providers.

Helps you focus and get things done! Pomodoro timer, block websites and integrated to-do list.
Boosts your productivity and helps you accomplish tasks! Features include a Pomodoro timer, website blocker, and a built-in to-do list.
Comprehensive ad blocker: blocks YouTube ads, banners, popups and more.

KalkanBlock is a comprehensive ad blocker extension. Its single purpose is to
block advertisements, trackers, popups, and other unwanted content to provide
users with a cleaner, faster, and more private browsing experience. All features
— network request blocking, cosmetic element hiding, YouTube ad skipping, and
popup prevention — serve this single unified purpose of ad and tracker blocking.

Détecte et traite automatiquement les messages à caractère toxique sortants sur les reseaux sociaux. Blocage de site personnalisé.

CyberProtect, est une extension google qui vous permet de tenir à l'oeil le comportement de vos enfants sur le web. Elle permet de bloquer les sites qui peuvent leur causer du tort ou être dangereux pour eux.
Stop doom scrolling! Take back control of your browsing with our privacy-first AI powered extension, Rewire!

Take back control of your browsing with Rewire! Our free, privacy-first AI detects negative content and helps you break free from doom scrolling. 

All analysis happens locally on your computer—no data ever leaves your machine. The extension aims to identify and quantify "doomscrolling" by analyzing the content of web pages and tracking user interaction. It does this for a predefined list of popular websites like YouTube, Reddit, Instagram, X, and more!

View your browsing habits with the analytics dashboard, gain insights into usage, scrolling, daily average doom score, domains visited, and more! `Block` troublesome domains or get notified when you consecutively encounter negative content.

Stay focused, stay positive, and browse on your own terms.
Blocks triggering sites, tracks your detox streak, and keeps you on the path to peace.

Take control of your screen time. Detox Shield blocks distracting sites with a motivational redirect page, completely removes YouTube Shorts from your experience (homepage, search, sidebar, recommendations), and auto-switches YouTube search to the Videos filter. Ships with a starter blocklist — fully customizable via a simple JSON file. Tracks your detox streak to keep you motivated. No data collected, no accounts, no cloud — everything stays local.
